title: PM Lane 308 - Project Miner Temp Power Actuals Capture Review Render-Authenticated Redeploy Gate
objective: Use a Render-authenticated surface to inspect and redeploy only the existing mutation-seam service apex-platform-mutation-seam from current clean-main, then rerun the bounded Temp Power actuals hosted smoke without executing a hosted write.
current_evidence: Lane 304 implemented POST /api/v1/mutations/temp-power-actuals-capture-reviews and GET /api/v1/reads/temp-power-actuals-capture-review-status locally.
Lane 305 proved accepted local first write, stable idempotent replay, current-match readback, unchanged downstream counts, and blocked downstream authorities.
Lane 306 added --include-temp-power-actuals-review to the hosted smoke path without executing a hosted write.

Lane 307 ran the bounded hosted smoke against both https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com and https://apex-platform-mutation-seam.onrender.com; both hosts returned health/root/approval-queue/schedule reads 200 but omitted the Temp Power actuals routes from OpenAPI and returned framework 404 for the actuals readback route.
Local environment check returned RENDER_CLI_ABSENT and no RENDER_* environment names.
required_executor_capability: Authenticated Render dashboard, API, or equivalent control surface with access to existing service apex-platform-mutation-seam.
Ability to inspect current service repo, branch, working directory, deploy commit, build command, start command, and health path without disclosing secrets.
Ability to trigger a redeploy of the existing service from current clean-main.
allowed_runtime_actions: Confirm service repo is jasonlswenson-sys/apex-power-ops, branch is clean-main, and working directory is apps/mutation-seam.
Trigger a redeploy of the existing service from current clean-main.
If needed for disambiguation only, rerun the same bounded smoke against https://apex-platform-mutation-seam.onrender.com.
Inspect runtime logs only far enough to classify remaining blocker if the new routes still do not appear.
not_allowed: No SQL write or schema migration.
stop_conditions: Stop if Render auth is unavailable.
Stop if repair would require creating a new service, changing DNS, changing auth, widening CORS, widening ingress, rotating secrets, or changing public host topology.
Stop if hosted proof would require sending a live mutation POST.
Stop if the service is already on current clean-main and still lacks the routes, because that indicates a product-code or deploy-build defect requiring a new code packet.
validation_steps: Render service inspection for apex-platform-mutation-seam: repo, branch, working directory, deploy commit, build command, start command, health path, autoDeploy, and non-secret env posture
Probe https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com/openapi.json and confirm /api/v1/mutations/temp-power-actuals-capture-reviews and /api/v1/reads/temp-power-actuals-capture-review-status are present
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes Render inspection/redeploy and bounded hosted smoke only. It does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, hosted mutation POSTs, customer-preview execution, finance/delivery/writeback widening, or secret disclosure.
